headlines.summary: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.

headlines.title: The May inflation numbers are due out Wednesday morning. Here's what to expect
headlines.summary: If the Wall Street consensus is correct, the consumer price index is expected to show inflation running at a 4.2% annual rate.

headlines.title: Chip rebound sparks hedging flurry from traders

headlines.title: Chip rebound has one trader buying protection

headlines.title: Apple’s AI could usher in a historic upgrade cycle that investors are overlooking

headlines.title: Micron and other memory makers are driving a ‘supercycle’ for this corner of the chip sector
headlines.summary: Chip-equipment companies are getting unprecedented visibility into companies’ supply plans, a UBS analyst says.

headlines.title: AST SpaceMobile’s stock experiences rocky trading as SpaceX plans to launch its satellites into orbit
headlines.summary: The company is developing a space-based broadband cellular network that could rival Elon Musk’s Starlink.

headlines.title: GM follows Ford by making a big energy bet — this time with an unconventional approach
headlines.summary: GM plans to revamp its energy business and place a big bet on sodium-ion batteries just as shares of rival Ford got a boost from a similar move a few weeks ago.

headlines.title: Angst over SpaceX IPO adds to dive in tech stocks
headlines.summary: Technology stocks tumbled on Tuesday, extending a swoon that began in early June, as investors anxiously await the historic SpaceX IPO later this week and retreat from hot parts of the AI playbook.

headlines.title: A powerful inflation storm is brewing — and your portfolio isn’t ready
headlines.summary: Looming El Niño shock threatens to drive up global commodity prices. These investments can help protect your purchasing power.
